testcase.name: test_dept_user_has_branch_id_in_auth

failure.message: AssertionError: Missing branch_id in dept user login response: {'id': '6e4a752b-4bf4-4ce9-96b2-2b2659c41bda', 'email': 'frontdesk@grandhotel.com', 'name': 'Front Desk Staff', 'role': 'department', 'client_id': 'dd94cf40-0d5a-43c0-90cd-fba45ec68640', 'department_id': 'c86dc140-604d-4677-99fe-5c2c61b49adf', 'client': {'id': 'dd94cf40-0d5a-43c0-90cd-fba45ec68640', 'name': 'Grand Hotel', 'business_type': 'hotel', 'email': 'info@grandhotel.com', 'enabled_platforms': ['google', 'tripadvisor', 'facebook', 'instagram', 'linkedin', 'x'], 'locations': [{'id': '6edd50b6-b316-4103-b1e2-593e768ae9b3', 'name': 'Main Branch', 'address': '', 'is_active': True}, {'id': 'af9b322e-d4d2-4d69-8a5f-cb72487416db', 'name': 'Downtown Branch', 'address': '', 'is_active': True}], 'is_active': True, 'brand_tone': 'professional', 'language': 'English', 'approval_required': True, 'do_dont_rules': [], 'reply_templates': [], 'created_at': '2026-02-20T09:50:24.768393+00:00'}} assert 'branch_id' in {'client': {'approval_required': True, 'brand_tone': 'professional', 'business_type': 'hotel', 'created_at': '2026-02-20T09:50:24.768393+00:00', ...}, 'client_id': 'dd94cf40-0d5a-43c0-90cd-fba45ec68640', 'department_id': 'c86dc140-604d-4677-99fe-5c2c61b49adf', 'email': 'frontdesk@grandhotel.com', ...}
